title: viola palmata var. vulgaris
intro: Viola palmata var. vulgaris, also known as the common yellow violet, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola palmata var. vulgaris include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
